channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. and Iran trade strikes, highlighting ceasefire fragility
item.description: President Trump accused Iran of violating the framework agreement, while Tehran threatened to halt U.S. talks.

item.title: Three firefighters killed on Colorado-Utah border as wildfires worsen
item.description: The deaths occurred as crews fought multiple blazes in a dry region; two other firefighters were injured.

item.title: A politically divided church unites to eliminate medical debt
item.description: Trinity Moravian Church in Winston-Salem, N.C., raises funds to erase medical debt in its community.

item.title: Master the family cookout with perfectly cooked hot dogs
item.description: A comparison of microwave, air fryer, grill, and slow cooker methods for the most flavorful hot dogs.
